examples: I thought that a fairy tale was just a written version of an oral folktale.
Every storyteller, or, maybe every town, might have had a slightly different version of the same folktale.
The folktale he told to me is gruesome one.
Some even call this 3rd century folktale an Eastern version of Romeo and Juliet.
At the border of life and death, said a folktale, there was a river called the River of Forgetting, and on the bridge an old woman called Mrs.
